info.name: Runloop Benchmark API
info.description:
Run and manage Benchmarks and Benchmark Runs — the evaluation framework for AI coding agents. Supports SWE-Bench, SWE-smith, and custom benchmark definitions, scenario aggregation, run lifecycle (start/cancel/complete), scoring, and log retrieval.

Contact Support:
 Name: Runloop AI Support
 Email: support@runloop.ai

request.description: [Beta] Get a BenchmarkJob given ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: [Beta] Create a BenchmarkJob that runs a set of scenarios entirely on runloop.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Filter by name
The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.
Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.
If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

request.description: [Beta] List all BenchmarkJobs matching filter.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.

item.name: Cancel a currently running Benchmark run.

request.description: Cancel a Benchmark run. This will do the following: 1. Cancel all running scenarios and shutdown the underlying Devbox resources 2. Update the benchmark state to CANCELED 3. Calculate final score from completed scenarios

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
